Package org.rodinp.core.tests.relations

Class LegacyRelationParserTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.relations.AbstractItemRelationParserTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.relations.LegacyRelationParserTests
public class LegacyRelationParserTests extends AbstractItemRelationParserTests
Unit tests for parsers in class LegacyItemParsers. It ensures that the legacy item relations that are defined in the UI plug-in from contributions to org.eventb.ui.editorItems extension point are correctly parsed in order to be converted into item relations. These tests cover the case of a parent-child element relationship, a parent-child attribute relationship, and tests for the various kinds of legacy attribute references. Legacy parsers are not tested in error: they are defined on the top of parsers which inherit from ElementParser for which exhaustive testing is performed ItemRelationParserTests.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    validAllReferencesParse()
    Ensures that information from all kind of references which are mixed is correctly retrieved.
    void
    validChoiceReferenceParse()
    Ensures that information from a choiceAttribute reference is correctly retrieved.
    void
    validLegacyAttributeItem()
    Ensures that a valid relationship between an element parent and an attribute attrId is correctly parsed, and that the type attrType of this attribute is correctly associated.
    void
    validLegacyChildItem()
    Ensures that a valid one-to-one parent-child relationship between two legacy element types parent and child is correctly parsed.
    void
    validTextReferenceParse()
    Ensures that information from a textAttribute reference is correctly retrieved.
    void
    validToggleReferenceParse()
    Ensures that information from a toggleAttribute reference is correctly retrieved.
